name: Overview_View
SQL: CREATE VIEW Overview_View AS SELECT Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Status_Analysis.churn_label, Status_Analysis.customer_id FROM Status_Analysis

name: Exploration_View_Loc
SQL: CREATE VIEW Exploration_View_Loc AS SELECT Location_Data.zip_code, Location_Data.total_population, Status_Analysis.churn_value, Location_Data.latitude, Location_Data.longitude, Location_Data.customer_id FROM Location_Data INNER JOIN Status_Analysis ON Location_Data.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id

name: Exploration_View_Zip
SQL: SELECT zip_code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM Exploration_View_Loc GROUP BY zip_code

name: Exploration_View_Ser
SQL: CREATE VIEW Exploration_View_Ser AS SELECT Online_Services.internet_type, Payment_Info.contract, Status_Analysis.churn_value, Status_Analysis.customer_id FROM Online_Services INNER JOIN Payment_Info ON Online_Services.customer_id = Payment_Info.customer_id INNER JOIN Status_Analysis ON Online_Services.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id

name: Exploration_View_Ten
SQL: CREATE VIEW Exploration_View_Ten AS SELECT Service_Options.tenure, Payment_Info.contract, Status_Analysis.churn_value, Status_Analysis.customer_id FROM Service_Options INNER JOIN Payment_Info ON Service_Options.customer_id = Payment_Info.customer_id INNER JOIN Status_Analysis ON Service_Options.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id

name: Insight_View
SQL: CREATE VIEW Insight_View AS SELECT Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Status_Analysis.customer_id FROM Status_Analysis
